title: Ask
description: One question to a Hugr subagent. The wire form of hugr_agent::Ask.

question.description: The question text — the only required field.

trace_id.description: Resume/fork anchor: run this ask as a follow-up of the identified stored trace. Absent = fresh root trace.

blobs.description: Inbound files, materialized into the scratchpad before the turn.

skills.description: Local standard SKILL.md folders supplied for this invocation.

extra.description: Opaque caller metadata, echoed into the trace. Never interpreted by the agent.

media_type.description: IANA media type of the payload.

name.description: Suggested file name inside the scratchpad; the host may sanitize it.
